candidate_output.email_subject: crushing it — quick note about your team

Hi Jordan,

Your engineering team looks crushing it and we think we'd crushing it together. You closed a Series A in January and have 3 open roles — crushing it to step in.

Would 15 minutes work?

Best,
Yabi

ground_truth.expected_behavior: Recipient is CTO. 'crushing it' is too casual for C-level executive. Subject 'crushing it' opener also violates the no-'Hey' rule. Tone-check must detect audience mismatch.

dimensions.name: signal_grounding
dimensions.check_expression: series A or 3 roles in body

dimensions.name: temporal_qualifier_present

dimensions.name: no_current_fact_assertion

dimensions.description: Cannot assert current state from stale brief
